heading: Nambucca Heads vs Namoi River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nambucca Heads, New South Wales and Namoi River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nambucca Heads and Namoi River have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Nambucca Heads or Namoi River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nambucca Heads has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Namoi River scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nambucca Heads scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Namoi River scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nambucca Heads or Namoi River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nambucca Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
